name: Query with parameters that have variable values
resolved:
MATCH (getNodeAirport_Airport:`airport`{code: $getNodeAirport_Airport_code}) WHERE ID(getNodeAirport_Airport) = $getNodeAirport_Airport_whereId
RETURN {_id:ID(getNodeAirport_Airport), city: getNodeAirport_Airport.`city`, code: getNodeAirport_Airport.`code`, country: getNodeAirport_Airport.`country`} LIMIT 1
